title: Cell proliferation assay
steps: Cells were harvested and plated at a density of 100 cells per well in a 96-well plate (total volume = 100 μl).
10 μl of Cell Counting Kit-8 (Dojindo Molecular Technologies, Inc., Tokyo, Japan) reagent was added to each well for 4 h at 37°C.
The optical density was assessed in an automatic microplate spectrophotometer (Varioskan Flash, Thermo) at the wave length of 450 nm. All experiments were carried out in triplicate independently.
creator: Shuangshuang Li
